directives.directive: Treat the canonical honest Track B floor as the one recorded in reports/raw/robust_current-current_workflow-cpu-summary.json, reports/latest.md, and .omx/state/current_focus.md. Superseded numeric floor directives must not be treated as current truth.
Rule-faithful accounting must charge only the installed runtime payload under test: archive.zip, inflate.sh, config.env, and analyze_roi.py. Do not revert to broader repo-local byte counting.

Before canonicalizing any future robust_current floor, require scorer-backed candidate, canonical default-config regression, smoke gate, written promotion review, and a bug audit over pixel format, colorspace/range, frame parity/count, geometry, and branch-specific path differences.

notes.content: Robust_current inflator correctness is byte-layout sensitive: rawvideo output must be explicit rgb24. AV1 failure at 97.45 was caused by yuv444p rawvideo bytes; forcing -pix_fmt rgb24 in inflate.sh and analyze_roi.py repaired the same AV1 recipe to 2.20.

Authoritative evidence for the live Track B floor: reports/raw/2026-04-05-av1-debug-rerun/robust_current-av1-524x394-rgb24-current_workflow-cpu-summary.json and reports/raw/2026-04-05-av1-floor-promotion/robust_current-av1-floor-current_workflow-cpu-summary.json. Canonical synced summary/report: reports/raw/robust_current-current_workflow-cpu-summary.json and ...-report.txt.

Preserved comparison point: prior x265 floor scored 3.25 at 424x318 / medium / 23 / keyint48 / bframes4 / ref4 / lanczos+lanczos. Keep submissions/robust_current/config.x265-3.25.env for controlled comparisons and rollback safety.

Best-writeup artifacts are continuously publishable. Canonical Cloudflare Pages project is comma-lab with canonical URL https://comma-lab.pages.dev . Latest preview observed in current cycle: https://ccb8ffa3.comma-lab.pages.dev . Deploy command: npx wrangler pages deploy reports/graphs/site --project-name comma-lab .

Post-promotion verification baseline: python3 -m py_compile src/comma_lab/*.py submissions/robust_current/analyze_roi.py reports/graphs/build_dashboard.py reports/graphs/build_static_site.py ; bash -n submissions/robust_current/compress.sh ; bash -n submissions/robust_current/inflate.sh ; python3 reports/graphs/build_dashboard.py && python3 reports/graphs/build_static_site.py .

Latest winning tradeoff: CRF33 -> CRF34 on the repaired AV1 path reduced bytes by ~6.08% and improved total score from 2.20 to 2.19 despite mild pose/seg increases. This is a model experiment for future one-axis neighborhood probes.

Writeup/site now includes richer lineage/mechanism surfaces plus experiment journal and promotion review pages. Canonical URL remains https://comma-lab.pages.dev ; latest Wrangler-confirmed preview in this cycle: https://7628099e.comma-lab.pages.dev .

Live Track B floor: 2.19 at 524x394 / libsvtav1 / preset0 / crf34 / film-grain22 / bicubic / unsharp. Candidate and canonical default-config regression both passed at 2.19.
